summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 2 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: No 🔴 or 🟡 findings. Implementation matches spec; user-facing contract (valid spec → unchanged behavior, invalid → loud failure with brainstorm hint) is delivered and tested on both sides of the gate. Eval written to `.team/features/document-driven-development/tasks/task-6/eval-product.md`.

**Evidence:** Read full `test/run-spec-gate.test.mjs`, gate code at `bin/lib/run.mjs:925-955`, handshake, test-output artifact (546/546 pass), and STATE.json. Prior round's 🟡 (existsSync guard) is closed: line 124 is now `assert.ok(existsSync(statePath))` and line 127 asserts `tasks.length >= 1`. Both gate branches exit 2 before `planTasks(...)` at line 960, so reaching the state assertions is direct evidence the gate passed. No critical or warning findings; eval written to `tasks/task-4/eval-tester.md`.
